name: ant-farm-explorer
summary: One-click pheromone-and-observe loop for the RAPP Ant Farm. Wraps the Ant + ColonyObserver agents into a single rapplication tile per the RAPP_Store contract.

per_rapp_state._purpose: Local cache of the operator's recent pheromones (offline-dimension support — survives kernel restarts; reassimilates via Dream Catcher on reconnect).

_note: Same rapp-application/1.0 shape that lives in kody-w/RAPP_Store, but bundled in the neighborhood's own rar/. Per the universal RAR pattern: every planted seed CAN host its own rapplications that participants install — making the seed self-sufficient as a downloadable, brainstem-runnable package.
